default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the ESEO project design and implementation strategy for Metronome's pricing model directory.](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Project scope: Hub page with 20+ company cards, categorized by industry; individual company pages with pricing data, analysis, and Metronome's take](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Design approach: Metronome to handle in-house design/development, adapting GrowthX's prototype](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Data pipeline: GrowthX to create for scraping, fact-checking, and generating analysis; aiming for 20 companies initially, scaling to 120+](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Webflow integration: Explore best practices for efficient content population and potential API usage for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview and Design Approach

  - [Hub page: Directory/index of company cards, categorized by industry (e.g., AI models, video companies, voice APIs)](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Company subpages: Include pricing model snapshot, historical analysis, text segments on approach, and Metronome's perspective](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Metronome to handle design in-house, using GrowthX's prototype as a guideline and applying Metronome's branding](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Data Pipeline and Content Generation

  - [GrowthX to build pipeline(s) for:](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Data scraping and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Pricing model analysis](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Editorial content generation using Metronome's knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Output: Mostly text files (MD or other formats) for CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Aim to start with 20 companies, potentially scaling to 120+ over time](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Consider generating additional blog post content (500-800 words) for each company page](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

### Webflow Integration and Scaling Considerations

  - [Explore Webflow's capabilities for handling tables and complex data](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Investigate options for efficient content population:](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
      - [Manual CMS entry for initial 20 companies](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [Potential API integration for scaling to 100+ companies](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Discuss with Webflow developer (Jan) to determine best approach for large-scale additions](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Future Enhancements and Data Utilization

  - [Landing page evolution: Start simple, expand with summary data and highlighted companies as database grows](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Potential for data slicing and trend analysis once sufficient entries are available](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Consider implementing tagging system (20+ tags per company) for easy categorization and filtering](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kris to design Metronome-branded version based on GrowthX prototype](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Kris to meet with Jan (Webflow developer) to discuss implementation strategy](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin parsing Metronome's data and building knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop data and analysis pipelines (2-3 weeks estimated)](https://fathom.video/share/U3q8U4-JQSz_5FrVLVH5VD1z79-_Vzmu?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
